ground_truth.description: Photo from Gold Coast at Burleigh Heads beach, skyline of Surfers Paradise in distance. Hard to get specifics without metadata.
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo from Gold Coast taken from the Burleigh Heads beach; you can see the skyline of Surfers Paradise in the distance. It would be hard to get the specifics without metadata. Daytime, clear skies.

locations.name: Burleigh Heads beach, Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia

details.description: A long sandy beach with wet reflective sand and gentle surf, photographed in clear daylight. A few people and a dog are visible near the shoreline. In the distance, a dense skyline of high‑rise towers rises through sea haze, dominated by a very tall, slender tower with a spire (Q1). The coastline curves toward the cluster of skyscrapers, typical of the Gold Coast looking north from Burleigh Heads. The sky is bright blue with scattered cumulus clouds over the ocean.

details.description: A wide, sunlit Gold Coast beach scene with a clear blue sky. In the foreground is Burleigh Beach with wet and dry sand meeting gentle surf. A lone person stands near the left shore and a small animal (dog) runs along the wet sand toward the water. In the distance, a dense cluster of high-rise buildings forms the Surfers Paradise skyline along the Gold Coast coastline, visible just above the ocean horizon. The photo appears to be taken from Burleigh Heads, looking north toward Surfers Paradise.

details.description: Wide sandy beach with wet reflective shoreline and small surf under a clear blue sky. A few people and a dog walk along the waterline. In the distance, a dense coastal skyline of high‑rise towers stretches along the shore, with one very tall spired skyscraper standing out at center. The scene appears to look north from Burleigh Heads Beach toward the Surfers Paradise/Gold Coast skyline.

details.description: A wide coastal scene taken from Burleigh Heads Beach facing east toward the Gold Coast. The sky is clear and blue with a few puffy clouds near the horizon. The ocean has gentle waves breaking near the shore, and the wet dark sand in the foreground reflects the light. On the left, a person stands, and a dog runs along the water’s edge. In the distance, a dense cluster of high-rise buildings forms the horizon, suggesting the Gold Coast skyline. Overall, the image conveys a sunny beach day with a distant urban backdrop.

details.description: A scenic coastal photograph taken from a sandy beach, looking north along the coastline. In the foreground, a wide expanse of wet and dry sand is visible, with a person standing on the left and a dog running through the shallow water on the right. The middle ground features the Pacific Ocean with rolling white-capped waves breaking towards the shore. The background is dominated by the distinct high-rise skyline of the Gold Coast, specifically the districts of Broadbeach and Surfers Paradise, rising sharply against the horizon. The sky is a clear, vibrant blue with a bank of white cumulus clouds resting low on the ocean horizon to the right. The lighting indicates a bright, sunny day.

details.description: A vertical wide-angle photograph taken from a sandy beach, looking north towards a distant urban skyline. The foreground shows a wide expanse of sand, partially in deep shadow, with a dog running through the shallow surf and a few people standing near the water's edge. The ocean features rolling white-capped waves. In the distance, the prominent high-rise skyline of Surfers Paradise and Broadbeach is visible under a clear blue sky, with large white cumulus clouds building on the right horizon. The tallest building in the cluster is identifiable as the Q1 tower.

details.description: A long sandy beach with gentle surf looks north toward a dense coastal skyline. The skyline is unmistakably the Gold Coast, dominated by the Q1 Tower with its tall spire at center, surrounded by numerous modern high‑rise residential towers. Slight sea mist softens the base of the buildings. A vegetated headland sits to the left before the cluster of towers, consistent with the Burleigh Headland when viewing Surfers Paradise from beaches farther south. Wet sand reflects the blue sky; a few beachgoers and a dog are visible but not the main subject.

details.description: A wide, sunny beach scene with smooth, dark sand in the foreground and a calm, reflective tidal area near the shore. A dog runs along the wet sand close to the water, while a person and a child stand at the left edge of the beach. In the distance, a dense skyline of tall, modern high-rise buildings lines the coast, suggesting Surfers Paradise on the Gold Coast, Australia. The sky is a clear blue with a cluster of white clouds toward the right, and the overall lighting creates gentle shadows on the sand and silhouettes of the figures and buildings.

details.description: Sunny coastal scene showing a wide sandy beach with wet reflective sand, small shore break waves and scattered beachgoers and a dog. In the distance, a dense coastal skyline of modern high‑rise towers lines the shore; a very tall tower with a thin spire (Q1) stands prominently near the center. A low, tree‑covered headland appears to the left. The view looks along the coast toward the Surfers Paradise/Gold Coast skyline, likely from a southern beach looking north.

details.description: A wide beach scene under a clear blue sky. The horizon features a dense cluster of high-rise buildings forming a distant city skyline along the coastline. In the foreground, dark shadowed sand meets lighter wet sand near shallow surf, with a few people visible near the water and a dog running along the shoreline. Gentle waves roll onto the beach, and a band of fluffy clouds sits to the right above the skyline.

details.description: A wide, scenic view of a beach on the Gold Coast, Australia, looking north along the coastline. In the foreground, a sandy beach stretches out with wet sand reflecting the blue sky; a person stands in silhouette on the left, another sits nearby, and a dog runs through the shallow water on the right. To the right, the Pacific Ocean features gentle rolling waves. The background is dominated by the distinct high-rise skyline of Surfers Paradise and Broadbeach. The Q1 Tower is the most prominent landmark, identifiable by its extreme height and spire. The lighting suggests late afternoon, with long shadows cast towards the ocean.

details.description: A vertical wide-angle shot of a sandy beach at low tide, looking north towards a prominent city skyline. The foreground shows wet sand reflecting the sky, with a dog running and a few people scattered along the shoreline. In the distance, a dense cluster of high-rise buildings is visible, including the iconic Q1 tower with its distinct spire. The ocean waves are rolling in gently from the right. The sky is a clear, deep blue with a bank of white cumulus clouds on the right horizon. A large shadow from a nearby headland or building covers the bottom left foreground.
